channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: US judge rejects Joe Biden’s lawsuit asking to withhold memoir recordings
item.description: Biden, a former Democratic president, argued that releasing the recordings would violate his right to privacy.

item.title: Thirty dead at DRC displacement camp as Ebola threat grows
item.description: At least 30 people have died since May in the Kigonze displacement camp in the Democratic Republic of Congo.

item.title: USA beat Australia 2–0 to book knockout spot at World Cup
item.description: An own goal and a goal by Alex Freeman helped the home side maintain a perfect record and progress to the round of 32.

item.title: Spain’s Yamal says ‘very early, unnecessary’ to play full World Cup match
item.description: 'It's not the time to play a whole match,' Lamine Yamal said ahead of Spain's match against Saudi Arabia.

item.title: Canada’s Kone undergoes major leg surgery; to miss rest of World Cup
item.description: Kone is expected to make a full recovery after breaking his left leg, with multiple fractures, in the match against Qatar.

item.title: Does Trump have to submit the Iran memorandum of understanding to Congress?
item.description: A 2015 law requiring congressional approval for any Iran nuclear deal is in the spotlight after this week's memo.

item.title: US announces new round of Israel-Lebanon talks in Washington next week
item.description: Talks come as Hezbollah, Israel say new ceasefire has been reached in wake of US-Iran memorandum to end war.

item.title: Italian Prime Minister says she didn’t ‘beg’ Trump for G7 photograph
item.description: Italian Prime Minister says she didn't ‘beg’ Trump for G7 photograph.

item.title: Israel kills ‘a child a day’ on average in Gaza despite ceasefire, UN says
item.description: 'No ceasefire can be considered meaningful while children continue to be killed' says UNICEF.

item.title: Brazil vs Haiti LIVE: World Cup 2026
item.description: Follow our live build-up, with full team news coverage, ahead of our text commentary stream of the Group C clash.

item.title: The UK: No. 10 Revolving Door
item.description: UK PM Keir Starmer faces growing pressure after Andy Burnham’s by-election win.

item.title: Iran deputy FM says ‘ready to move forward’ in deal with US
item.description: Deputy FM Khatibzadeh tells Al Jazeera diplomacy is way forward, but US must ensure Israel stops attacks on Lebanon.

item.title: Norway seeks to ban trade with illegal Israeli settlements in Palestine
item.description: Norwegian government announces consultation on new bill as it steps up policies regarding 'unlawful' Israeli activities.

item.title: Iran war: Success or disaster? Mehdi Hasan and David Des Roches
item.description: Mehdi Hasan goes Head to Head with former Pentagon official David Des Roches on the Iran war.

item.title: How is the Iran-US agreement being viewed in Israel?
item.description: Washington rebukes right-wing Israeli ministers for criticism.

item.title: One person killed, several injured as two trains collide north of London
item.description: Police said a 'major incident' was declared after the crash near Bedford, some 90km away from London.

item.title: Backlash for UK MP who linked England World Cup result to women’s safety
item.description: Backlash for UK MP who linked England World Cup result to women’s safety.

item.title: More than 70 medics infected with Ebola as DRC outbreak spreads ‘fast’
item.description: Aid cuts and poor sanitation are deepening fears that Ebola is spreading through displacement camps.

item.title: Dramatic rescue as fire rips through school in Japan
item.description: Eyewitness video shows dozens of schoolchildren forced onto a narrow window ledge after a fire broke out in Tokyo.

item.title: Italy’s top diplomat nixes US trip after Meloni says Trump fabricated story
item.description: The Italian prime minister has accused Trump of making up a story that she 'begged' him for a photo at G7 in France.

item.title: How is China using AI in the classroom?
item.description: How will teaching artificial intelligence help China take on a high-tech future?

item.title: Israeli air strikes hit Lebanon minutes after new ceasefire
item.description: Minutes after a new ceasefire had come into force between Israel and Hezbollah, explosions were seen in southern Lebanon

item.title: Two men jailed for arson attacks on property linked to UK prime minister
item.description: The Ukrainian-born men with alleged links to Russia targeted property associated with Keir Starmer in May 2025.

item.title: Israel continues attacks on Lebanon despite agreeing to ceasefire
item.description: At least 47 people killed in Israeli attacks on Lebanon since midnight as US-Iran talks stall.

item.title: Germany and Ivory Coast aim to seal World Cup knockout place: All to know
item.description: Team news, prediction, and lineups as Germany and Ivory Coast meet in Group E aiming to secure last-32 qualification.
